## What & why

<!-- A short summary of the change and the motivation. Link any related issue, e.g. Closes #123. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q tools/skate_commander/test tools/skate_ros2/test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / READMEs if behaviour changed
- [ ] No safety check (collision guard, deadman / E-STOP, protocol, joint map) was weakened
